name: ModalTitle
visual_summary: ModalTitle is a modal title UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable modal behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
